data.title: 国际服Discord频道2,000,000成员纪念礼物
data.summary: [200K Discord Members Appreciation Gift] Blue Archive's Official Discord has hit 200K members! Log i
data.body:
[200K Discord Members Appreciation Gift]

Blue Archive's Official Discord has hit 200K members!
Log in now to receive our sincerest gift to celebrate this special occasion! ❤️

🎁Thank-You Gift: 10-Recruitment Ticket x1
🗓️Period: 8/4 (Sun) 3:00 AM ~ 8/11 (Sun) 2:59 PM (UTC)![5fkNuYIglpnFiYQNZa6Soo6nuPAzL5ia.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/5fkNuYIglpnFiYQNZa6Soo6nuPAzL5ia.jpg)
